channel.title: Jonathan Verdun — Blog
channel.description: QA Automation Engineering, test architecture, and CI/CD hardening — by Jonathan Verdun

item.title: Why I use property-based testing for my portfolio's critical logic
item.description: How fast-check catches edge cases that example-based tests miss — and why I run it on my portfolio's i18n, routing, and domain invariants.

item.title: Why my portfolio has a CI pipeline — treating your resume like production code
item.description: Every quality claim on jonathanverdun.com is backed by an automated gate. Here's why I treat my resume like production code.

item.title: How I enforce 100% test coverage in CI with Jest + GitHub Actions
item.description: A practical guide to setting up automated coverage gates that prevent merging code below 100% — without driving your team crazy.

item.title: Building a WCAG-compliant theme system with OKLCH and Tailwind v4
item.description: How I built a dark + light theme system that passes WCAG AA contrast requirements using OKLCH color space and Tailwind CSS v4 CSS-variable tokens.
